docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,653.16 FILED BY AETNA FINANCE CO, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES SF3 AS TO DEFENDANT BAILEY KEM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAILEY KEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AETNA FINANCE CO, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES SF3 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAILEY KEM $1,653.16 PRINCIPAL, $58.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,711.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO DEFEND. RETURNED, NOT AT THAT ADDRES.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $32.34 ACCRUED INTEREST, $55.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT BAILEY KEM
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BAILEY KEM
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $761.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BAILEY KEM
